description: Golden transcript: server-proxy connect + capabilities handshake + session-list snapshot + session.claim (returns a sessionId, no endpoint) + session.attach (binds a data connection to the session). D5 (tc-4b6k.4): one well-known broker socket; the command connection claims, a data connection attaches — there is no per-session socket / endpoint.

transcript.label: client responds with its own capabilities + durable identity (D2, tc-4b6k.1)
server-proxy sends session-list snapshot
transcript.syncPoint: After this message, the client has the current session list. If sessions-watch is in the negotiated feature set, the server-proxy subsequently pushes sessions.added/removed/renamed deltas.

transcript.label: client claims (or creates) session 'main' to obtain its stable sessionId (D5: no endpoint)
server-proxy responds with the sessionId (no endpoint under D5, tc-4b6k.4)

on a SECOND connection to the SAME broker socket (after its own server-proxy.capabilities handshake), the client binds to the session with session.attach — this connection now IS the session-proxy data+control stream (D5, tc-4b6k.4)
